It takes a bit too long to realize you’re not in civilization; the sneering faces of heavily armed laquines and kaithrits balance your moment of bewilderment. The others you see, mostly nude, are tightly-collared pleasure slaves not unlike those dancing the recreation deck’s never-ending nights away. It dawns on you, seeing a chatty group of rat-eared imps scampering past, catching a whiff of some unsweated herm-rabbits[flags.MET_SLAVEBREAKERS| even glimpsing a slutty titty-snake far down the deck]... that this area belongs exclusively to the powerful gangs whom run Zhèng Shi — to all those who’ve gotten in your way thus far. Laughter and revelry riots in the north while an eerie quiet lingers in the south. Nobody’s drawing weapons on you, and you’re in no hurry to give them a reason.
